name: hotfix
description: Fast path for bugs documented in docs/HARD_BUGS_REGISTRY.md. Skips product-manager and architect — bug is already scoped.
use_when: Fixing a known BUG-XXX from docs/HARD_BUGS_REGISTRY.md with an existing fix documented
preconditions: Bug has a BUG-ID in HARD_BUGS_REGISTRY.md
Fix is under 50 lines and single-concern
